scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @itharbors/mysql-contracts && npm run build -w @itharbors/relationship-graph && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-core && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-cli
scripts.build: npm run build -w @itharbors/mysql-contracts && npm run build -w @itharbors/relationship-graph && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-core && npm run build -w @itharbors/kit-cli && npm run plugins:build
scripts.test:toolchain: npm run test -w @itharbors/relationship-graph && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-core && npm run test -w @itharbors/kit-cli
scripts.test: npm run build:packages && npm run test:product && npm run test:toolchain
scripts.check: npm run build && npm test && npm run plugins:check
